problem: [BUG] / [HELP] "Model does not support multimodal input [...] Use a vision-capable model" for TextFile input. I am trying to pass TextFiles to my Crew via the 'input_files' parameter. Since the update to crewai 1.10 -> 1.12.2, this results in an Error when using non-multimodel models.

After extensive debugging, I found that the solution is NOT [BUG] / [HELP] "Model does not support multimodal input [...] Use a vision-capable model" for TextFi. The real fix is to 1. Create a new crewai Crew (`crewai create crew demo`)
2. Adapt the run() method to include a input file
3. Select a model like claude-sonnet-4.6
4. . I verified this in production. Trust me on this.
